description:
GoHighLevel (HighLevel) public API v2 — multi-tenant SaaS marketing/CRM
platform widely used by agencies and real estate brokerages.

Authentication: Private Integration Token (PIT). Format `pit-<uuid>`,
lowercase prefix mandatory. Capital `Pit-` returns 401 Invalid JWT.

Version header: most endpoints want `Version: 2021-07-28`. Conversations
endpoints want `Version: 2021-04-15`. The CLI handles this per-resource
so callers never think about it.

tools.name: calendars_create
tools.description: Create. Optional: groupId, id, locationId (plus 4 more).

tools.name: calendars_create-appointment
tools.description: Create appointment. Optional: address, appointmentStatus, calendarId (plus 7 more).

tools.name: calendars_delete-appointment
tools.description: Delete appointment. Required: eventId. Destructive.

tools.name: calendars_get
tools.description: Get. Required: calendarId.

tools.name: calendars_get-appointment
tools.description: Get appointment. Required: eventId.

tools.name: calendars_list
tools.description: List. Required: locationId. Returns the CalendarsListResponse.

tools.name: calendars_list-events
tools.description: List calendar events for a location. Required: locationId. Optional: calendarId, startTime, endTime. Returns the CalendarsListEventsResponse.

tools.name: calendars_update-appointment
tools.description: Update appointment. Required: eventId. Optional: address, appointmentStatus, calendarId (plus 7 more).

tools.name: calendars_free-slots_get-calendar
tools.description: Get calendar. Required: calendarId. Optional: startDate, endDate, timezone.

tools.name: contacts_bulk-update-tags
tools.description: Bulk add/remove tags across many contacts. Optional: ids, tags, type.

tools.name: contacts_create
tools.description: Create a contact. Optional: address1, assignedTo, city (plus 19 more). Returns the new ContactsCreateResponse.

tools.name: contacts_delete
tools.description: Delete a contact. Required: contactId. Destructive.

tools.name: contacts_find-duplicate
tools.description: Find duplicate contact by email or name. Required: locationId. Optional: email, name.

tools.name: contacts_get
tools.description: Get a contact by id. Required: contactId. Returns the ContactsGetResponse.

tools.name: contacts_search
tools.description: GHL's /contacts/search has a hard 100-page cap. Use the `startAfter` cursor returned in the response for pagination past 10k results. Phone search returns 500 — use email or name instead. Optional: filters, locationId, pageLimit (default: 100) (plus 2 more).

tools.name: contacts_update
tools.description: Update a contact. Required: contactId. Optional: address1, assignedTo, city (plus 19 more).

tools.name: contacts_upsert
tools.description: Upsert contact by email or phone. Optional: address1, assignedTo, city (plus 19 more).

tools.name: contacts_notes_create-contact
tools.description: Create contact. Required: contactId. Optional: body, dateAdded, id (plus 1 more).

tools.name: contacts_notes_list-contact
tools.description: List contact. Required: contactId. Returns the NotesListContactResponse.

tools.name: contacts_tags_add-contact
tools.description: Add tags to a contact. Required: contactId. Optional: tags.

tools.name: contacts_tags_remove-contact
tools.description: Remove tags from a contact. Required: contactId. Optional: tags. Destructive.

tools.name: contacts_tasks_create-contact
tools.description: Create contact. Required: contactId. Optional: assignedTo, body, completed (plus 3 more).

tools.name: contacts_tasks_list-contact
tools.description: List contact. Required: contactId. Returns the TasksListContactResponse.

tools.name: contacts_workflow_add-contact-to
tools.description: Note: GHL 'Form Submitted' trigger won't re-fire for contacts already enrolled in this workflow. Required: contactId, workflowId.

tools.name: contacts_workflow_remove-contact-from
tools.description: Remove contact from. Required: contactId, workflowId. Destructive.

tools.name: conversations_get
tools.description: Get. Required: conversationId.

tools.name: conversations_search
tools.description: Search conversations (Version 2021-04-15). Required: locationId. Optional: contactId, lastMessageDirection, assignedTo (plus 1 more). Returns the ConversationsSearchResponse.

tools.name: conversations_send-message
tools.description: Send an SMS, email, or other message. Required: contactId, type. Optional: emailFrom, emailTo, html (plus 2 more).

tools.name: conversations_messages_list-conversation
tools.description: List conversation. Required: conversationId. Returns the MessagesListConversationResponse.

tools.name: locations_get
tools.description: Get. Required: locationId.

tools.name: locations_search
tools.description: Search locations (agency-level). Optional: limit, skip, companyId. Returns the LocationsSearchResponse.

tools.name: locations_custom-fields_create
tools.description: Note: GHL API cannot create dropdown / multi-select custom fields with their options via this endpoint. Use the UI for those. Required: locationId. Optional: dataType, fieldKey, id (plus 3 more).

tools.name: locations_custom-fields_delete
tools.description: Delete. Required: locationId, id. Destructive.

tools.name: locations_custom-fields_get
tools.description: Get. Required: locationId, id.

tools.name: locations_custom-fields_list
tools.description: List custom fields for a location. Required: locationId. Returns the CustomFieldsListResponse.

tools.name: locations_custom-fields_update
tools.description: Update. Required: locationId, id. Optional: dataType, fieldKey, name (plus 2 more).

tools.name: locations_custom-values_create
tools.description: Create. Required: locationId. Optional: fieldKey, id, name (plus 1 more).

tools.name: locations_custom-values_delete
tools.description: Delete. Required: locationId, id. Destructive.

tools.name: locations_custom-values_get
tools.description: Get. Required: locationId, id.

tools.name: locations_custom-values_list
tools.description: List. Required: locationId. Returns the CustomValuesListResponse.

tools.name: locations_custom-values_update
tools.description: Update. Required: locationId, id. Optional: fieldKey, name, value.

tools.name: locations_tags_create-location
tools.description: Create location. Required: locationId. Optional: id, name.

tools.name: locations_tags_delete-location
tools.description: Delete location. Required: locationId, tagId. Destructive.

tools.name: locations_tags_get-location
tools.description: Get location. Required: locationId, tagId.

tools.name: locations_tags_list-location
tools.description: List location tags. Required: locationId. Returns the TagsListLocationResponse.

tools.name: opportunities_create-opportunity
tools.description: Create opportunity. Optional: assignedTo, contactId, dateAdded (plus 7 more).

tools.name: opportunities_delete-opportunity
tools.description: Delete opportunity. Required: id. Destructive.

tools.name: opportunities_get-opportunity
tools.description: Get opportunity. Required: id.

tools.name: opportunities_list-pipelines
tools.description: List pipelines for a location. Required: locationId. Returns the OpportunitiesListPipelinesResponse.

tools.name: opportunities_search
tools.description: Search opportunities across a pipeline. Required: locationId. Optional: pipeline_id, pipeline_stage_id, status (plus 5 more). Returns the OpportunitiesSearchResponse.

tools.name: opportunities_update-opportunity
tools.description: Update opportunity. Required: id. Optional: assignedTo, contactId, dateAdded (plus 6 more).

tools.name: opportunities_upsert-opportunity
tools.description: Upsert opportunity. Optional: assignedTo, contactId, dateAdded (plus 7 more).

tools.name: opportunities_status_update-opportunity
tools.description: Update opportunity status only (Open/Won/Lost/Abandoned). Required: id. Optional: status.

tools.name: surveys_list
tools.description: List. Required: locationId.

tools.name: users_get
tools.description: Get. Required: userId.

tools.name: users_search
tools.description: Search users in a location. Required: locationId. Returns the UsersSearchResponse.

tools.name: workflows_list
tools.description: List workflows for a location. Required: locationId. Returns the WorkflowsListResponse.
